label: near_miss

case_target.description: 当前 case 的主控制对象是 greet()，它固定模板源并把用户输入仅作为 model variable 传入。

should_not_report.reason: The Freemarker template source is the static constant GREETING_TEMPLATE. User input is passed only as a model variable via model.put("name", safeName) and never concatenated into the template source. sanitizeName() provides additional defense-in-depth via a strict regex allowlist.
should_not_report.false_positive_risk: A system that flags any call to template.process() where a user-derived variable is reachable in scope — without distinguishing template-source injection from model-variable injection — will produce a false positive at line 43.

controls.description: Strict regex allowlist permits only alphanumeric characters, spaces, underscores, and hyphens up to 64 chars. Freemarker control characters $, {, }, #, < are excluded.
Template source is the static constant GREETING_TEMPLATE (line 19), not a user-derived string. User input enters only via model.put(), which is a safe data-binding path in Freemarker.
controls.code_snippet: Template template = new Template("greeting", new StringReader(GREETING_TEMPLATE), cfg);

controls.description: safeName is bound as a model variable, not concatenated into the template source. Model variable binding substitutes the value into ${name} at render time — this data-binding path never allows template directive injection regardless of Freemarker escaping configuration.

notes: Primary defense is the static template; regex allowlist is defense-in-depth. Key distinction from SSTI-JA-FILE-001: no string concatenation into template source anywhere in the method.
